page_content:
ARTT269 Special Topics in Study Abroad II (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program. Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

ARTH499 Honors Thesis (1-6 Credits) Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art History & Archaeology department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARTT320 Elements of Painting (3 Credits) Concepts and fundamental processes of oil and/or acrylic painting. Prerequisite: ARTT200, ARTT210, and ARTT150; or permission of ARHU- Art department.
